overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a cowboy character running through a desert landscape reminiscent of Monument Valley. The character traverses sandy terrain dotted with sparse vegetation, approaching and passing large red sandstone buttes and mesas under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with distant sandstone mesas

agents.ego_description: running steadily across the desert plain toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: large paired red sandstone towers rising from the desert floor
tall thin rock spire visible on the horizon
flat-topped mountain formation on the left horizon
low bushes and dry vegetation dotting the sandy terrain

segments.scene_description: The character runs across an open desert plain under a bright sun, approaching distant red rock formations. Sparse desert vegetation dots the sandy ground as the twin buttes and a distant spire grow gradually larger on the horizon.

events.description: character veers left toward the large twin buttes, shifting trajectory from center to left

agents.ego_description: running toward the large twin rock formations while navigating around desert scrub

segments.scene_description: The character continues running while gradually turning left toward the massive twin buttes. The rock formations shift from the center to the left side of the frame as the character closes the distance, with the distant spire now visible to the right.

events.description: character passes the twin buttes on the left side, moving around the massive rock formation

agents.ego_description: running past the large rock formation with the buttes now on the left side, heading toward open desert

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the massive twin buttes, which now tower on the immediate left before falling behind. With the large rock formations passed, the view opens again toward the distant spire now centered ahead, as the character continues through the desert scrub.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an open desert plain that transitions from a distant approach to a close encounter with towering red rock formations. It begins with the character running through sandy terrain dotted with sparse vegetation, as twin buttes and a distant spire gradually grow larger on the horizon under a bright sun. As the character continues forward, the camera gradually turns left, shifting the massive twin buttes from the center to the left side of the frame while the spire remains visible to the right. The scene then shifts as the character runs directly past the towering buttes, which loom on the immediate left before falling behind. Finally, the view opens up once more, centering the distant spire ahead as the character continues their journey through the desert scrub.
